Nested lists:

- Fruits
  - Apples
  - Pears
  - Peaches
- Vegetables
  - Broccoli
  - Chard

Mixed nesting:

1. First level
   - Nested bullet
   - Another nested
2. Back to first level

Nested case:

A.  Upper Alpha
    I.  Upper Roman.
        (6) Decimal start with 6
            c) Lower alpha with paren
